name: tla_forall_unfold_intensional_bridge
reason: tla_forall_unfold is external_body bridging tla_forall's TempPred::new closure-wrapped forall to a bare forall — resolves closure identity gap without proof

name: temp_pred_equality_intensional_bridge
reason: temp_pred_equality is external_body forcing intensional equality from mutual entailment — structurally distinct closures collapsed to equal without proof

name: mutual_entailment_derives_false_if_distinct
reason: temp_pred_equality forces p == q from mutual entailment — if two preds are intensionally distinct but semantically equivalent this derives false

name: tla_forall_not_equality_bridge
reason: chains both external_body axioms to force intensional equality between tla_forall(|a| not(p(a))) and not(tla_exists(p)) — structurally distinct nested closures collapsed

name: tla_exists_negation_from_forall_not
reason: uses the forced intensional equality to derive semantic consequence — if the closure bridge is unsound, ∀a.¬p(a) might not correctly negate ∃a.p(a) at the TempPred level
